name: goodman-remotion-demo
description: Cinematic Goodman product demo rendered with Remotion

scripts.dev: npm run assets && remotion studio src/index.ts --no-open
scripts.compositions: npm run assets && remotion compositions src/index.ts
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run compositions
scripts.render: npm run assets && remotion render src/index.ts GoodmanDemo goodman_demo.mp4 --codec=h264 --audio-codec=aac --crf=16 --pixel-format=yuv420p --concurrency=50%
scripts.poster: npm run assets && remotion still src/index.ts GoodmanDemo poster.png --frame=600
